svg.title: World Wide Consortium...
svg.desc: The contour of all continents, with dots showing a number of cities: hosts, offices, and team residences. The countour of the continents as well as the generation of the proper coordinates for the cities have been generated with the online KAPRO tool at the University of Zurich. The original output has been been simplified and styled, but the coordinates are still quite weird... Also, the full image has been rescaled, the original was quite small.

defs.desc: Symbols used for the various city categories

g.desc: This is the set of polylines describing the continen coastlines
Set of dots for the hosts. Note that INRIA is set as three dots: Grenoble, Rocquencourt, and Sophia Antipolis; MIT is set to Boston; Keio to Tokyo
Set of dots for the offices
Set of dots for the residence of team members (other than the host and their immediate surroundings)

defs.desc: Animation definitions. Each legend is defined twice: to control the on/off switch of the corresponding set of cities (hosts, offices, and residences)
